title: Microgonium henzaianum
taxonomy: Microgonium henzaianum belongs to the family Aneuraceae. This family is a group of liverworts that are primarily found in tropical regions. Microgonium henzaianum is a type of thalloid liverwort, characterized by its flat, leaf-like structures. It is native to the tropical regions of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia. The classification of Microgonium henzaianum also places it within the class Marchantiopsida, which is a group of liverworts.
